nav.disabledForBackend: Not available for the detected backend ({{backend}}).

setup.title: Connect to a backend
setup.intro: OpenConsole talks to your backend directly from the browser. Configure the connection to get started.
setup.detecting: Detecting backend on the default endpoint…
setup.notDetected: No backend auto-detected. Enter the settings manually.

settings.title: Connection settings
settings.endpointHint: Leave empty to use real AWS. Use http://localhost:4566 for LocalStack, http://localhost:9000 for MinIO.
settings.websiteEndpointHint: Host (with port) that serves static website hosting. Backend-specific.
settings.discoverHint: Detected backends — click to fill the form:
settings.noCandidates: No local backend found. Enter settings manually.
settings.credsHint: Default keys may be filled in — replace them with your real access key / secret.
settings.awsWarning: Credentials are stored in your browser's localStorage in plain text. Use a least-privilege IAM key, especially for real AWS.
settings.corsNote: The target bucket/backend must allow CORS from this site's origin for browser requests to succeed.
settings.allowOrigin: Allow this origin on your backend:
settings.errCreds: Access key / secret is invalid or lacks permission.

bucket.heading: Buckets
bucket.subtitle: S3
bucket.forceDelete: Also delete all objects inside (non-empty bucket)
bucket.selectPrompt: Select a bucket on the left

object.empty: Empty. Drag files here or upload.

details.title: Object: {{key}}
details.urlNote: Opens only if the object is publicly accessible.

versioning.label: Versioning
versioning.note: Once enabled, a bucket can only be Suspended, not disabled.

tagging.emptyDeletes: Applying with no tags removes the tag set.

website.publicNote: To serve publicly, allow s3:GetObject via a bucket policy.

cors.label: CORS configuration
cors.hint: CORSRules array (JSON). Apply empty to remove CORS.

policy.label: Bucket policy
policy.hint: Bucket policy document (JSON). Apply empty to remove the policy.

error.connection: Cannot reach the endpoint. Check that the backend is running and CORS allows this origin.
